130101.english: Paul, and Silvanus, and Timotheus, unto the church of the Thessalonians which is in God the Father and in the Lord Jesus Christ: Grace be unto you, and peace, from God our Father, and the Lord Jesus Christ.
130101.cherokee: ᏉᎳ ᎠᎴ ᏌᏱᎳ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎹᏗ ᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᏗᏣᏁᎶᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏡᎬ ᏕᏏᎶᏂᎦ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ; ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎨᏤᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
130101.phonetic: Quo-la a-le Sa-yi-la a-le Di-ma-di wi-tsv-yo-we-la-si di-tsa-ne-lo-di i-tsa-da-tlu-gv De-si-lo-ni-ga na-s-gi e-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi A-ga-yv-li-ge-i, a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv; gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv ge-tse-la-di-do-he-s-di nv-da-yu-na-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi I-gi-do-da a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.

130102.english: We give thanks to God always for you all, making mention of you in our prayers;
130102.cherokee: ᎣᏣᎵᎡᎵᏤᎰ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏥᎥ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎢᏨᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎪ ᎣᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ;
130102.phonetic: O-tsa-li-e-li-tse-ho U-ne-la-nv-hi ni-go-hi-lv ni-hi ni-tsi-v nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-go-i, i-tsv-ne-i-s-di-s-go o-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv-i;

130103.english: Remembering without ceasing your work of faith, and labour of love, and patience of hope in our Lord Jesus Christ, in the sight of God and our Father;
130103.cherokee: ᏃᎬᎨᏫᏍᎬᎾ ᎣᏣᏅᏓᏗᏍᎪ ᏕᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᎵᏂᎬᏁᎲ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏨᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎡᏨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ;
130103.phonetic: No-gv-ge-wi-s-gv-na o-tsa-nv-da-di-s-go de-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv i-tso-hi-yu-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi, a-le i-tsa-li-ni-gv-ne-hv a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi, a-le di-tsv-ni-di-yu ge-sv u-du-gi e-tsv-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv na-s-gi I-gi-do-da;

130104.english: Knowing, brethren beloved, your election of God.
130104.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏥᎨᏳᎯ, ᎡᏣᏑᏰᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ.
130104.phonetic: Na-s-gi tso-tsi-ga-ta-ha, i-da-li-nv-tli U-ne-la-nv-hi i-tsi-ge-yu-hi, e-tsa-su-ye-dv ge-sv-i.

130105.english: For our gospel came not unto you in word only, but also in power, and in the Holy Ghost, and in much assurance; as ye know what manner of men we were among you for your sake.
130105.cherokee: ᎣᏍᏛᏰᏃ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎣᎦᏤᎵᎦ ᎥᏝ ᎧᏁᏨᎯᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏥᎷᎯᏍᏓᏁᎴᎢ, ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏔᎵ ᎤᏛᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏄᏜᏓᏏᏛᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᏃᎦᏍᏛ ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎸ ᏂᎯ ᏥᏅ ᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ.
130105.phonetic: O-s-dv-ye-no ka-no-he-dv o-ga-tse-li-ga v-tla ka-ne-tsv-hi-quo ge-sv yi-tsi-lu-hi-s-da-ne-le-i, u-li-ni-gi-di-yu-s-gi-ni ge-sv na-s-quo ta-li u-dv-dv-i, a-le Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do, a-le u-tsa-ti nu-dla-si-dv-sv-na ge-sv-i; na-s-gi-ya tsi-tsi-ga-ta-ha no-ga-s-dv i-tsv-ye-la-di-do-lv ni-hi tsi-nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi.

130106.english: And ye became followers of us, and of the Lord, having received the word in much affliction, with joy of the Holy Ghost:
130106.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ ᏂᏣᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ [ᎡᏥᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ,] ᏕᏣᏓᏂᎸᏨ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏥᎩᎵᏲᎬᎢ, ᎤᎵᏠᏯᏍᏛ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏅᏓᏩᏓᎴᏅᎯ;
130106.phonetic: A-le a-yv s-gi-s-da-wa-de-gi ni-tsa-li-s-ta-nv-gi, a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi [e-tsi-s-da-wa-de-gi,] de-tsa-da-ni-lv-tsv ka-no-he-dv u-tsa-ti i-tsi-gi-li-yo-gv-i, u-li-tlo-ya-s-dv u-li-he-li-s-di ge-sv ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do nv-da-wa-da-le-nv-hi;

130107.english: So that ye were ensamples to all that believe in Macedonia and Achaia.
130107.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏧᎾᏟᎶᏍᏙᏗ ᏂᏣᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎹᏏᏙᏂ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎦᏯ ᎠᏁᎯ.
130107.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsu-na-tli-lo-s-do-di ni-tsa-li-s-ta-nv-gi na-ni-v a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi Ma-si-do-ni a-ne-hi a-le E-ga-ya a-ne-hi.

130108.english: For from you sounded out the word of the Lord not only in Macedonia and Achaia, but also in every place your faith to God-ward is spread abroad; so that we need not to speak any thing.
130108.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᎢᏤᎲ ᎤᏓᎴᏅᎩ ᎤᏃᏴᎵᏒᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎥᏝ ᎹᏏᏙᏂᏉ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎦᏯ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏱᏭᎷᏤᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏕᎨᏌᏗᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏦᎢᏳᏒ ᏚᏰᎵᏒ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏎ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎣᎦᏛᏗ ᏱᎩ.
130108.phonetic: Ni-hi-ye-no i-tse-hv u-da-le-nv-gi u-no-yv-li-sv-gi ka-no-he-dv U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li-ga, v-tla Ma-si-do-ni-quo a-le E-ga-ya u-wa-sv yi-wu-lu-tse-i, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni ni-ga-v de-ge-sa-di-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi e-tso-i-yu-sv du-ye-li-sv; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di v-tla a-se go-hu-s-di o-ga-dv-di yi-gi.

130109.english: For they themselves shew of us what manner of entering in we had unto you, and how ye turned to God from idols to serve the living and true God;
130109.cherokee: ᎤᏅᏒᏰᏃ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᎪᎬᏁᎭ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏫᏨᎷᏤᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎸ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏗᏢ ᎢᏣᎦᏔᎲᏍᏔᏅ ᏕᏥᏲᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏰᎸᎯ, ᏗᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎬᏃᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ;
130109.phonetic: U-nv-sv-ye-no gv-ni-ge-sv ni-go-gv-ne-ha nu-s-dv wi-tsv-lu-tse-lv-i, a-le ni-tsa-dv-ne-lv U-ne-la-nv-hi i-di-tlv i-tsa-ga-ta-hv-s-ta-nv de-tsi-yo-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi di-ye-lv-hi, di-tsi-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di-yi gv-no-dv a-le u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi tsi-gi;

130110.english: And to wait for his Son from heaven, whom he raised from the dead, even Jesus, which delivered us from the wrath to come.
130110.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎡᏥᎦᏘᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᏥ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏥᏕᎤᎴᏔᏁᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎫᏓᎴᏒ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎤᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ.
130110.phonetic: A-le e-tsi-ga-ti-di-s-di-yi na-s-gi U-we-tsi ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-lo-hi-s-di-yi, na-s-gi u-yo-hu-sv tsi-de-u-le-ta-ne-i, na-s-gi Tsi-sa, na-s-gi tsi-gu-da-le-sv u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di u-lu-hi-s-di tsi-gi.

130201.english: For yourselves, brethren, know our entrance in unto you, that it was not in vain:
130201.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏒᏰᏃ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᏄᏍᏛ ᏫᏨᎷᏤᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
130201.phonetic: I-tsv-sv-ye-no i-tsi-ga-ta-ha, i-da-li-nv-tli, nu-s-dv wi-tsv-lu-tse-lv-i, na-s-gi a-se-quo-quo ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

130202.english: But even after that we had suffered before, and were shamefully entreated, as ye know, at Philippi, we were bold in our God to speak unto you the gospel of God with much contention.
130202.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏃᎩᎩᎵᏲᏦᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎪᎩᏐᏢᏃᎢ ᏈᎵᎩᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᏃᏥᏍᎦᎢᎲᎾ ᎣᎦᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎣᏣᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛ ᎢᏨᏃᎮᎮᎸᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᏔᎵ ᎤᏛᏛᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᏟᏂᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
130202.phonetic: Na-s-quo-s-gi-ni i-gv-yi no-gi-gi-li-yo-tso-i a-le ni-go-gi-so-tlv-no-i Qui-li-gi-yi, na-s-gi tsi-tsi-ga-ta-ha, no-tsi-s-ga-i-hv-na O-ga-ne-la-nv-hi o-tsa-li-s-ga-s-do-dv i-tsv-no-he-he-lv-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga, ta-li u-dv-dv-gi u-tsa-ti a-tli-ni-gv-ne-di ge-sv-i.

130203.english: For our exhortation was not of deceit, nor of uncleanness, nor in guile:
130203.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏬᏁᏔᏅᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏓᎴᎾᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎦᏓᎭᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏠᏄᎮᏛ;
130203.phonetic: I-tsv-wo-ne-ta-nv-ye-no v-tla a-da-le-na-s-di-s-gi yi-ge-se-i, v-tla a-le ga-da-ha-i, v-tla a-le a-tlo-nu-he-dv;

130204.english: But as we were allowed of God to be put in trust with the gospel, even so we speak; not as pleasing men, but God, which trieth our hearts.
130204.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏰᎵᏉ ᏧᏰᎸᏅ ᎣᎦᎨᏅᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎣᏥᏁᎦ; ᎥᏝ ᏴᏫᏉ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᏗ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎪᎵᏰᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ ᏗᎩᎾᏫ.
130204.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni ye-li-quo tsu-ye-lv-nv o-ga-ge-nv-di-s-di-yi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv, na-s-gi-ya o-tsi-ne-ga; v-tla yv-wi-quo o-si-yu u-ni-ye-lv-di, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni na-s-gi di-go-li-ye-s-gi tsi-gi di-gi-na-wi.

130205.english: For neither at any time used we flattering words, as ye know, nor a cloke of covetousness; God is witness:
130205.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏥᏬᏂᏍᎬ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᎠᏎᏉ ᎠᏓᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏲᏨᏗᏍᎨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏲᏨᏗᏍᎨ ᏲᏧᏢᏗᏍᎨ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎠᎬᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎯ;
130205.phonetic: V-tla a-le o-tsi-wo-ni-s-gv i-lv-hi-yu a-se-quo a-da-lv-quo-do-di ge-sv yo-tsv-di-s-ge-i, na-s-gi tsi-tsi-ga-ta-ha, v-tla a-le go-hu-s-di yo-tsv-di-s-ge yo-tsu-tlv-di-s-ge tsu-gv-wa-lo-di a-gv-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i; U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hi;

130206.english: Nor of men sought we glory, neither of you, nor yet of others, when we might have been burdensome, as the apostles of Christ.
130206.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏴᏫ ᎪᎩᎸᏉᏙᏗᏱ ᏲᎩᏲᎮᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏂᎯ ᏱᏨᏲᏎᎮᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴᎢ; ᏰᎵᏉ ᎡᎦᏃ ᎦᎨᏛ ᎢᏗᎦᏲᏨᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎩ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎣᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
130206.phonetic: V-tla a-le yv-wi go-gi-lv-quo-do-di-yi yo-gi-yo-he-i, v-tla ni-hi yi-tsv-yo-se-he-i, v-tla a-le nv-wa-na-da-le-i; ye-li-quo e-ga-no ga-ge-dv i-di-ga-yo-tsv-ne-di ge-sv-gi, Ga-lo-ne-dv o-gi-nv-si-dv ge-sv i-yu-s-di.

130207.english: But we were gentle among you, even as a nurse cherisheth her children:
130207.cherokee: ᎣᎦᏓᏅᏘᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒᎩ ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏧᏓᏍᏓᎢ ᏥᏓᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏍᎪ ᏧᏪᏥ;
130207.phonetic: O-ga-da-nv-ti-yu-s-gi-ni ge-sv-gi i-tsv-ye-la-di-do-hv-i, na-s-gi-ya tsu-da-s-da-i tsi-da-s-qua-ni-go-di-s-go tsu-we-tsi;

130208.english: So being affectionately desirous of you, we were willing to have imparted unto you, not the gospel of God only, but also our own souls, because ye were dear unto us.
130208.cherokee: ᎤᏣᏘᏃ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎣᎦᏝᏴᏉ ᏗᏨᏲᎯᏎᏗᏱ ᎥᏝ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᎬᏒ ᏙᏨᏅᎢ, ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
130208.phonetic: U-tsa-ti-no i-tsv-ge-yu-sv i-yu-s-di, o-ga-tla-yv-quo di-tsv-yo-hi-se-di-yi v-tla o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv u-wa-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni o-gv-sv do-tsv-nv-i, nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi i-tsv-ge-yu-i-yu ge-sv-i.

130209.english: For ye remember, brethren, our labour and travail: for labouring night and day, because we would not be chargeable unto any of you, we preached unto you the gospel of God.
130209.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏅᏔᏉᏰᏃ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᏙᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏙᎩᏯᏪᏥᏙᎸᎢ; ᏗᎬᏩᎩᏨᏗᏰᏃ ᏙᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᏃᎦᏚᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᏂᏣᏛᏅ ᎦᎨᏛ ᎢᏲᏨᏴᏁᏗᏱ, ᎢᏨᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
130209.phonetic: I-tsa-nv-ta-quo-ye-no, i-da-li-nv-tli, do-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv a-le do-gi-ya-we-tsi-do-lv-i; di-gv-wa-gi-tsv-di-ye-no do-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv no-ga-du-li-s-gv-na ge-sv i-yu-s-di a-si-yv-wi ni-tsa-dv-nv ga-ge-dv i-yo-tsv-yv-ne-di-yi, i-tsv-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-lv-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga.

130210.english: Ye are witnesses, and God also, how holily and justly and unblameably we behaved ourselves among you that believe:
130210.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎯ ᏂᏣᎵᏍᏗᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎫᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎣᎨᏙᎸ ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎸ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᎯ;
130210.phonetic: Ni-hi i-tsi-ga-ta-hi ni-tsa-li-s-di-ha, a-le na-s-quo U-ne-la-nv-hi, ni-ga-v na-s-ga-nv-na ge-sv a-le du-yu-go-dv ge-sv, a-le ga-gu-hi-s-do-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv o-ge-do-lv i-tsv-ye-la-di-do-lv ni-hi i-tso-hi-yu-hi;

130211.english: As ye know how we exhorted and comforted and charged every one of you, as a father doth his children,
130211.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎢᏥᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎸ ᎢᏨᏬᏁᏔᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᎦᎵᏍᏓᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏰᏯᏔᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏥᏂᏕᎦᏪᏎᎰ ᏧᏪᏥ,
130211.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsi-tsi-ga-ta-ha i-tsi-si-yv-wi-ha ni-tsv-we-se-lv i-tsv-wo-ne-ta-nv, a-le i-tsv-ga-li-s-da-dv, a-le i-tsv-ye-ya-ta-nv-i, na-s-gi-ya a-ga-yv-li-ge tsi-ni-de-ga-we-se-ho tsu-we-tsi,

130212.english: That ye would walk worthy of God, who hath called you unto his kingdom and glory.
130212.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏤᏙᎲ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎢᏤᎵᏍᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᏯᏅᏛ ᏥᎩ ᏫᏥᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏤᎵᎪᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏗᎨᏒᎢ.
130212.phonetic: Na-s-gi ni-hi i-tse-do-hv U-ne-la-nv-hi o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di i-tse-li-s-di-yi, na-s-gi i-tsi-ya-nv-dv tsi-gi wi-tsi-lu-hi-s-di-yi u-tse-li-go-hi a-le u-tse-li ga-lv-quo-di-yu di-ge-sv-i.

130213.english: For this cause also thank we God without ceasing, because, when ye received the word of God which ye heard of us, ye received it not as the word of men, but as it is in truth, the word of God, which effectually worketh also in you that believe.
130213.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏃᏥᏲᎯᏍᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎣᏣᎵᎡᎵᏤᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏕᏣᏓᏂᎸᏨ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᏯᏛᎦᏁᎸᎯ, ᎥᏝ ᏴᏫᏉ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏱᏗᏣᏓᏂᎸᏤᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏕᏣᏓᏂᎸᏨᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏥᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏅᎯ.
130213.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha no-tsi-yo-hi-s-di-s-gv-na o-tsa-li-e-li-tse-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi i-yu-no de-tsa-da-ni-lv-tsv ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi a-yv s-gi-ya-dv-ga-ne-lv-hi, v-tla yv-wi-quo u-na-tse-li ka-no-he-dv i-yu-s-di yi-di-tsa-da-ni-lv-tse-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni u-tse-li ka-no-he-dv, u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya tsi-gi, na-s-gi-ya de-tsa-da-ni-lv-tsv-gi, na-s-gi na-s-quo u-tsa-ti tsi-du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha de-tsa-da-nv-dv ni-hi na-s-gi i-tso-hi-yu-nv-hi.

130214.english: For ye, brethren, became followers of the churches of God which in Judaea are in Christ Jesus: for ye also have suffered like things of your own countrymen, even as they have of the Jews:
130214.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏰᏃ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᏗᏥᏍᏓᏩᏕᎩ ᏂᏣᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ ᏧᏗᏱ ᎠᏁᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ; ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏠᏱ ᏕᏥᎩᎵᏲᏤᎸᎩ ᏗᏣᏤᎵᎦ ᏴᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏚᏂᎩᎵᏲᏤᎴ ᎠᏂᏧᏏ;
130214.phonetic: Ni-hi-ye-no, i-da-li-nv-tli, di-tsi-s-da-wa-de-gi ni-tsa-li-s-ta-nv-gi tsu-na-ne-lo-di du-na-da-tlu-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-tse-li-ga Tsu-di-yi a-ne-hi, na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa gv-wo-hi-yu-hv-s-gi tsi-gi; ni-hi-ye-no na-s-quo u-tlo-yi de-tsi-gi-li-yo-tse-lv-gi di-tsa-tse-li-ga yv-wi, na-s-gi-ya na-s-gi tsi-du-ni-gi-li-yo-tse-le A-ni-tsu-si;

130215.english: Who both killed the Lord Jesus, and their own prophets, and have persecuted us; and they please not God, and are contrary to all men:
130215.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏧᏂᎸᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎾᏙᎴᎰᏍᎩ ᎤᏅᏒ ᏧᎾᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎪᎦᏕᏯᏙᏔᏅᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏱᎾᎾᏛᏁᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ ᏓᏂᎦᏘᎴᎦ;
130215.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo tsu-ni-lv-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa, a-le a-na-do-le-ho-s-gi u-nv-sv tsu-na-tse-li-ga, a-le a-yv go-ga-de-ya-do-ta-nv-gi; a-le v-tla o-si-yu u-ye-lv-di U-ne-la-nv-hi yi-na-na-dv-ne-ha, a-le na-ni-v yv-wi da-ni-ga-ti-le-ga;

130216.english: Forbidding us to speak to the Gentiles that they might be saved, to fill up their sins alway: for the wrath is come upon them to the uttermost.
130216.cherokee: ᎪᎩᏅᏍᏓᏕᎰᎢ ᏦᏥᏬᏁᏙᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎤᏂᎧᎵᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ; ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᏩᏍᏛ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᎸ.
130216.phonetic: Go-gi-nv-s-da-de-ho-i tso-tsi-wo-ne-do-di-yi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi, na-s-gi ga-ge-tsi-s-de-lv-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, u-ni-ka-li-i-s-di-yi ni-go-hi-lv u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-i; u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di-s-gi-ni ge-sv wa-s-dv i-yv-dv u-ni-lu-tse-lv.

130217.english: But we, brethren, being taken from you for a short time in presence, not in heart, endeavoured the more abundantly to see your face with great desire.
130217.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᏞᎦ ᎣᎦᏓᏓᎴᏔᏅ ᏦᏥᏰᎸᎢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᏦᎩᎾᏫᏱ, ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎣᎦᏟᏂᎬᏁᎸᎩ ᏕᏣᎧᏛ ᏦᎩᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᏚᎸᏗ ᎣᎬᏔᏅᎩ.
130217.phonetic: A-yv-s-gi-ni i-da-li-nv-tli, tle-ga o-ga-da-da-le-ta-nv tso-tsi-ye-lv-i, v-tla-no tso-gi-na-wi-yi, u-tli i-ga-i o-ga-tli-ni-gv-ne-lv-gi de-tsa-ka-dv tso-gi-go-wa-dv-di-yi, u-tsa-ti a-du-lv-di o-gv-ta-nv-gi.

130218.english: Wherefore we would have come unto you, even I Paul, once and again; but Satan hindered us.
130218.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎣᎦᏚᎵᏍᎬᎩ ᏫᏨᎷᏤᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ, ᏉᎳ, Ꮀ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏒᎩ, ᏌᏉ ᎠᎴ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎠᏆᏚᎸᎲᎩ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᏎᏓᏂ ᎣᎩᏲᏍᏙᏓᏁᎲᎩ.
130218.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di o-ga-du-li-s-gv-gi wi-tsv-lu-tse-di-yi, a-le a-yv, Quo-la, ho u-gv-wi-yu-sv-gi, sa-quo a-le ta-li-ne a-qua-du-lv-hv-gi; a-se-no Se-da-ni o-gi-yo-s-do-da-ne-hv-gi.

130219.english: For what is our hope, or joy, or crown of rejoicing? Are not even ye in the presence of our Lord Jesus Christ at his coming?
130219.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏰᏃ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎣᎬᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏱᎦᏓᏅᏓᏗᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎠᎵᏍᏚᎶ ᎣᎦᎵᎮᎵᏍᏙᏗ?  ᏝᏍᎪ ᏂᎯ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ?
130219.phonetic: Ga-do-ye-no u-du-gi o-gv-ha, a-le ga-do o-s-dv yi-ga-da-nv-da-di-ha, a-le ga-do u-s-di a-li-s-du-lo o-ga-li-he-li-s-do-di?  Tla-s-go ni-hi yi-ge-se-s-di a-ga-ta-hv i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv na-hi-yu ga-lu-tsv-ha?

130220.english: For ye are our glory and joy.

130301.english: Wherefore when we could no longer forbear, we thought it good to be left at Athens alone;
130301.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᎦᏲᎦᏛᏂᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ, ᎣᏏᏳ ᎣᎩᏰᎸᏅᎩ ᎣᎬᏒ ᎣᎩᎧᎯᏯᏍᏗᏱ ᎡᏗᏂᏱ;
130301.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hna-quo u-tli i-go-hi-dv ga-yo-ga-dv-ni-di-s-di ni-ge-sv-na nu-li-s-ta-nv, o-si-yu o-gi-ye-lv-nv-gi o-gv-sv o-gi-ka-hi-ya-s-di-yi E-di-ni-yi;

130302.english: And sent Timotheus, our brother, and minister of God, and our fellowlabourer in the gospel of Christ, to establish you, and to comfort you concerning your faith:
130302.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎣᏥᏅᏒᎩ ᏗᎹᏗ, ᎣᏣᎵᏅᏟ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏛᏁᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏦᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏣᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᏥᎧᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ;
130302.phonetic: A-le o-tsi-nv-sv-gi Di-ma-di, o-tsa-li-nv-tli, a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi go-hu-s-di a-dv-ne-hi, a-le a-yv i-tsu-la-ha tso-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li u-gv-wa-li, na-s-gi di-tsa-li-ni-go-hi-s-do-di-yi, a-le di-tsi-ka-li-s-da-di-s-di-yi i-tso-hi-yu-sv u-gv-wa-li;

130303.english: That no man should be moved by these afflictions: for yourselves know that we are appointed thereunto.
130303.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏥᏖᎸᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ; ᎢᏨᏒᏰᏃ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎡᎩᏁᏤᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
130303.phonetic: Na-s-gi gi-lo a-tsi-te-lv-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na hi-a na-s-gi a-gi-li-yo-i-s-di ge-sv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv; i-tsv-sv-ye-no i-tsi-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi i-ga-li-s-da-ne-di-yi e-gi-ne-tse-lv-hi ge-sv-i.

130304.english: For verily, when we were with you, we told you before that we should suffer tribulation; even as it came to pass, and ye know.
130304.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᏥᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎲᎩ, ᏂᏨᏃᏁᎶ ᎢᎩᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏥᎦᏔᎭ.
130304.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ye-no tsi-tsv-ye-la-di-do-hv-gi, ni-tsv-no-ne-lo i-gi-gi-li-yo-i-s-di ge-sv-i; na-s-gi-ya tsi-nu-li-s-ta-nv, a-le na-s-gi tsi-tsi-ga-ta-ha.

130305.english: For this cause, when I could no longer forbear, I sent to know your faith, lest by some means the tempter have tempted you, and our labour be in vain.
130305.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅᎩ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎪᎯᏛ ᎬᏆᏛᏂᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ, ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏒᎩ ᎠᏆᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒᎢ, ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏴᏗᎤᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ ᎠᏓᎪᎵᏰᏍᎩ ᏳᏂᎪᎵᏰᎥ, ᏙᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᏃ ᎠᏎᏉ ᏱᏄᎵᏍᏔᏂᏙᎸ, ᎠᏇᎵᏒᎩ.
130305.phonetic: Na-s-gi nv-da-yu-li-s-do-ta-nv-gi, hna-quo u-tli i-go-hi-dv gv-qua-dv-ni-di-s-di ni-ge-sv-na nu-li-s-ta-nv, a-qua-da-nv-sv-gi a-qua-do-le-ho-hi-s-di-yi nu-s-dv i-tso-hi-yu-sv-i, go-hu-s-di yv-di-u-li-s-do-ta-nv a-da-go-li-ye-s-gi yu-ni-go-li-ye-v, do-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-no a-se-quo yi-nu-li-s-ta-ni-do-lv, a-que-li-sv-gi.

130306.english: But now when Timotheus came from you unto us, and brought us good tidings of your faith and charity, and that ye have good remembrance of us always, desiring greatly to see us, as we also to see you:
130306.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏗᎹᏗ ᎣᎩᎷᏤᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᏗᏤᎲ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏰᎸᏗ ᎣᎩᏃᎮᎮᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏤᎲ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏍᎩᏯᏅᏛᎢ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᏍᎩᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᎣᎦᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎢᏨᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ;
130306.phonetic: A-se-no hna-quo Di-ma-di o-gi-lu-tse-lv-hi tsi-gi, di-tse-hv nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi, a-le o-s-dv a-ye-lv-di o-gi-no-he-he-lv-hi tsi-gi, i-tso-hi-yu-sv a-le a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv i-tse-hv u-gv-wa-li, a-le ni-go-hi-lv o-si-yu s-gi-ya-nv-dv-i, u-tsa-ti i-tsa-du-li-s-gv s-gi-go-wa-dv-di-yi, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo a-yv o-ga-du-li-s-gv i-tsv-go-wa-dv-di-yi;

130307.english: Therefore, brethren, we were comforted over you in all our affliction and distress by your faith:
130307.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏨᏯᏓᏅᏖᎸ ᎤᎧᎵᏍᏗ ᎣᎦᏓᏅᏓᏛᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎣᏥᎩᎵᏲᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏪᎵᎯᏍᏗ ᎣᎦᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎬᎢ, ᏂᎯ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅᎩ.
130307.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, i-da-li-nv-tli, i-tsv-ya-da-nv-te-lv u-ka-li-s-di o-ga-da-nv-da-dv-gi ni-ga-v o-tsi-gi-li-yo-gv a-le u-we-li-hi-s-di o-ga-da-nv-ta-wa-de-gv-i, ni-hi i-tso-hi-yu-sv nv-da-yu-li-s-do-ta-nv-gi.

130308.english: For now we live, if ye stand fast in the Lord.
130308.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏰᏃ ᏥᎩ ᏦᏨᏃᏛ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏕᏥᏙᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏕᏣᏁᎶᏛᎢ.
130308.phonetic: Go-hi-ye-no tsi-gi tso-tsv-no-dv, i-yu-no u-li-ni-gi-dv de-tsi-do-ge-s-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi de-tsa-ne-lo-dv-i.

130309.english: For what thanks can we render to God again for you, for all the joy wherewith we joy for your sakes before our God;
130309.cherokee: ᎢᎳᎪᏰᏃ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᏲᏣᎫᏴᏓᏏ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏣᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᎬ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎣᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ;
130309.phonetic: I-la-go-ye-no i-ga-i a-li-he-li-s-di yo-tsa-gu-yv-da-si U-ne-la-nv-hi ni-hi ge-sv i-yu-s-di, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv ni-ga-v o-s-dv a-da-nv-da-di-s-di ge-sv na-s-gi o-tsa-da-nv-da-di-s-gv ni-hi ge-sv u-gv-wa-li o-ga-tse-li U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv-i;

130310.english: Night and day praying exceedingly that we might see your face, and might perfect that which is lacking in your faith?
130310.cherokee: ᏗᎬᏩᎩᏨᏗ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎣᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎣᏥᏔᏲᎯᎲ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎦᏲᎩᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏕᏣᎧᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᎩᎧᎵᏏᏐᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎷᎶᏥᏙᎲ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒᎢ.
130310.phonetic: Di-gv-wa-gi-tsv-di u-tsa-ti o-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv o-tsi-ta-yo-hi-hv, na-s-gi di-ga-yo-gi-go-wa-dv-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi de-tsa-ka-dv-i, a-le o-gi-ka-li-si-so-di-yi na-s-gi ga-lu-lo-tsi-do-hv i-tso-hi-yu-sv-i.

130311.english: Now God himself and our Father, and our Lord Jesus Christ, direct our way unto you.
130311.cherokee: ᎤᎾᎳᏅᎯᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎣᎦᏘᏅᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏤᎲᎢ.
130311.phonetic: U-na-la-nv-hi-no u-wa-sv na-s-gi I-gi-do-da, a-le i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, o-ga-ti-nv-s-di ge-se-s-di di-tse-hv-i.

130312.english: And the Lord make you to increase and abound in love one toward another, and toward all men, even as we do toward you:
130312.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏁᏉᏤᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏕᏣᏓᎨᏳᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏕᏥᎨᏳᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏴ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᏒᎢ;
130312.phonetic: A-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-yu-wa-ni-so-di ge-se-s-di i-tsi-ne-quo-tse-di-yi a-le u-tsa-ti i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi de-tsa-da-ge-yu-sv-i, a-le na-ni-v de-tsi-ge-yu-sv-i, na-s-gi-ya a-yv ni-hi i-tsv-ge-yu-sv-i;

130313.english: To the end he may stablish your hearts unblameable in holiness before God, even our Father, at the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ with all his saints.
130313.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏗᏥᎾᏫ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏰᏧᎢᏍᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎸ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ.
130313.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsu-li-ni-go-hi-s-do-di-yi di-tsi-na-wi, na-s-gi ga-ye-tsu-i-s-do-di ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi du-yu-go-dv ni-tsa-dv-ne-lv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv-i, na-s-gi I-gi-do-da, na-hi-yu ga-lu-tsv-ha i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv a-ne-he-s-di ni-ga-di-yu u-na-da-nv-ti tsu-tse-li-ga.

130401.english: Furthermore then we beseech you, brethren, and exhort you by the Lord Jesus, that as ye have received of us how ye ought to walk and to please God, so ye would abound more and more.
130401.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏨᏔᏲᏎᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏍᏗᏰᏗᎭ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏍᎩᏯᏛᎦᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎢᏤᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎬᏩᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎲ ᎧᏁᏉᏥᏎᏍᏗᏉ.
130401.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo, i-da-li-nv-tli, i-tsv-ta-yo-se-ha, a-le i-tsv-s-di-ye-di-ha, U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, na-s-gi na s-gi-ya-dv-ga-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi i-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi i-tse-da-s-di-yi na-s-gi o-si-yu gv-wa-ye-lv-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi ni-tsa-dv-ne-hv ka-ne-quo-tsi-se-s-di-quo.

130402.english: For ye know what commandments we gave you by the Lord Jesus.
130402.cherokee: ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏕᏨᏲᎯᏎᎸ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏰᎸᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
130402.phonetic: I-tsi-ga-ta-ha-ye-no nu-s-dv de-tsv-yo-hi-se-lv di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa o-si-yu u-ye-lv-nv-hi ge-sv-i.

130403.english: For this is the will of God, even your sanctification, that ye should abstain from fornication:
130403.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᎢ, ᏗᏣᏓᏅᎦᎸᏛ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏥᏲᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏗᏂᏏᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
130403.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi nu-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi a-da-nv-te-s-gv-i, di-tsa-da-nv-ga-lv-dv i-tsa-li-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi di-tsi-yo-hi-s-di-yi u-de-li-dv di-ni-si-di ge-sv-i;

130404.english: That every one of you should know how to possess his vessel in sanctification and honour;
130404.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏥᎥ ᎢᏥᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎢᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᎢ ᎤᏓᏅᎦᎸᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ;
130404.phonetic: Na-s-gi ni-tsi-v i-tsi-si-yv-wi-ha yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha i-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi i-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-do-di-yi i-tsi-ye-lv-i u-da-nv-ga-lv-dv ge-sv a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i;

130405.english: Not in the lust of concupiscence, even as the Gentiles which know not God:
130405.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏃ ᎢᏤᎳᏲᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᏥᎩ;
130405.phonetic: V-tla-no i-tse-la-yo-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi-ya na-na-dv-ne-hv tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi U-ne-la-nv-hi na-ni-ga-ta-hv-na tsi-gi;

130406.english: That no man go beyond and defraud his brother in any matter: because that the Lord is the avenger of all such, as we also have forewarned you and testified.
130406.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎶᏄᎮᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᏥᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ; ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᏗᏞᏤᎯ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎦᎥ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎢᏨᏃᏁᎸᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏲᎢᏳᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ.
130406.phonetic: Na-s-gi gi-lo u-lo-sv-s-da-ne-di-yi a-le u-lo-nu-he-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na a-na-li-nv-tli tsi-ni-ga-v-quo go-hu-s-di u-gv-wa-li; U-gv-wi-yu-hi-ye-no di-tle-tse-hi hi-a na-s-gi na-ga-v tsu-da-le-nv-dv, na-s-gi ga-yu-la i-tsv-no-ne-lv-hi a-le i-tsv-yo-i-yu-da-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi.

130407.english: For God hath not called us unto uncleanness, but unto holiness.
130407.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎩᏯᏅᎲ ᎦᏓᎭ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎢᎦᏓᏅᎦᎸᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
130407.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no v-tla yi-gi-ya-nv-hv ga-da-ha i-ga-li-s-do-di-yi i-ga-da-nv-ga-lv-dv-s-gi-ni i-ga-li-s-do-di-yi.

130408.english: He therefore that despiseth, despiseth not man, but God, who hath also given unto us his holy Spirit.
130408.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏓᏂᏉᏘᎯ, ᎥᏝ ᏴᏫ ᏱᎦᏂᏆᏘᎭ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ.
130408.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di gi-lo a-da-ni-quo-ti-hi, v-tla yv-wi yi-ga-ni-qua-ti-ha, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni, na-s-gi na-s-quo u-tse-li Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do i-gi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi.

130409.english: But as touching brotherly love ye need not that I write unto you: for ye yourselves are taught of God to love one another.
130409.cherokee: Ꭰ-ᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᏧᎾᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏚᎸᏗ ᏱᏂᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᏗᏱ; ᎢᏨᏒᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏤᏲᏅᎯ ᎢᎩ ᏗᏣᏓᎨᏳᏗᏱ.
130409.phonetic: A--s-gi-ni a-na-li-nv-tli tsu-na-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li v-tla u-du-lv-di yi-ni-tsa-li-s-da-ne-ha wi-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-di-yi; i-tsv-sv-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi i-tse-yo-nv-hi i-gi di-tsa-da-ge-yu-di-yi.

130410.english: And indeed ye do it toward all the brethren which are in all Macedonia: but we beseech you, brethren, that ye increase more and more;
130410.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎭ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏕᏥᎨᏳᎭ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎹᏏᏙᏂ ᎠᏁᎯ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏨᏍᏗᏰᏗᎭ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎢᏥᏁᏉᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᎢᎦᎢ;
130410.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ye-no na-s-gi ni-tsa-dv-ne-ha na-ni-v de-tsi-ge-yu-ha a-na-li-nv-tli Ma-si-do-ni a-ne-hi; a-se-no i-tsv-s-di-ye-di-ha, i-da-li-nv-tli, i-tsi-ne-quo-i-s-di-yi u-tli-hi-yu i-ga-i;

130411.english: And that ye study to be quiet, and to do your own business, and to work with your own hands, as we commanded you;
130411.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏟᏂᎬᏁᏗᏱ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎢᏣᏕᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎢᏣᏤᎵ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏗᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏒ ᏗᏦᏰᏂ ᏗᏨᏙᏗᏱ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎸᎢ;
130411.phonetic: A-le i-tsa-tli-ni-gv-ne-di-yi nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv i-tsa-de-di-yi, a-le i-tsv-sv i-tsa-tse-li di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di di-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi, a-le i-tsv-sv di-tso-ye-ni di-tsv-do-di-yi go-hu-s-di i-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi, na-s-gi-ya ni-tsv-we-se-lv-i;

130412.english: That ye may walk honestly toward them that are without, and that ye may have lack of nothing.
130412.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏏ ᎬᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏥᏓᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏁᎳ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏂᏥᏂᎬᏎᎲᎾ ᏱᎩ.
130412.phonetic: Na-s-gi o-si gv-ye-lv-di ge-tsi-da-s-di yi-gi a-ni-ga-ta-hv na-s-gi a-ne-la ni-ge-sv-na, a-le go-hu-s-di ni-tsi-ni-gv-se-hv-na yi-gi.

130413.english: But I would not have you to be ignorant, brethren, concerning them which are asleep, that ye sorrow not, even as others which have no hope.
130413.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎥᏝ ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎥᎾᏉ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏱᏨᏰᎵᏎᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏂᎵᏅᏨᎯ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᎤᏚᎩ ᏄᏅᏒᎾ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᎾᏍᏛᎢ.
130413.phonetic: A-se-no, i-da-li-nv-tli, v-tla na-ni-ga-ta-v-na-quo ge-se-s-di yi-tsv-ye-li-se-ha na-s-gi na u-ni-li-nv-tsv-hi u-gv-wa-li, na-s-gi u-yo i-tsa-da-nv-da-di-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na na-s-gi nv-wa-na-da-le u-du-gi nu-nv-sv-na na-s-gi-ya nu-na-s-dv-i.

130414.english: For if we believe that Jesus died and rose again, even so them also which sleep in Jesus will God bring with him.
130414.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏱᏙᎯᏳᎲᏍᎦ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏲᎱᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏚᎴᎯᏌᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏥᏌ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏂᎵᏅᏨᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏘᏃᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎷᏨᎭ.
130414.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no yi-do-hi-yu-hv-s-ga Tsi-sa u-yo-hu-sv-i, a-le du-le-hi-sa-nv-i, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo na-s-gi na Tsi-sa u-na-li-s-ga-s-do-ta-nv-hi u-ni-li-nv-tsv-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-ti-no-hi-s-di ge-se-s-di tsi-sa ga-lu-tsv-ha.

130415.english: For this we say unto you by the word of the Lord, that we which are alive and remain unto the coming of the Lord shall not prevent them which are asleep.
130415.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎭ ᎣᏨᏗᎭ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏁᏨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏗᏛᏃᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏓᎴᏂᏙᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎦᎷᏨ ᎢᏳᎢ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏙᎨᏗᎪᏅ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏂᎵᏅᏨᎯ.
130415.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-tsv-we-se-ha o-tsv-di-ha U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-ne-tsv-i, na-s-gi a-yv di-dv-no-dv a-le i-da-le-ni-do-hi U-gv-wi-yu-hi ga-lu-tsv i-yu-i v-tla yi-do-ge-di-go-nv na-s-gi na u-ni-li-nv-tsv-hi.

130416.english: For the Lord himself shall descend from heaven with a shout, with the voice of the archangel, and with the trump of God: and the dead in Christ shall rise first:
130416.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏛᏠᎠᏏᎵ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎶᏒᎯ ᎤᎵᏠᏯᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎷᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎧᏁᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏤᎷᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᏃᏴᎬᎢ;  ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯᏃ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᎦᏙᏔᏅᎯ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏙᏛᎾᎴᏂ;
130416.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-ye-no u-wa-sv dv-tlo-a-si-li ga-lv-la-di nv-da-yu-lo-sv-hi u-li-tlo-ya-s-de-s-di u-ne-lu-gv-i, a-le nu-gv-wi-yu-sv di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi ka-ne-gv-i, a-le a-tse-lu-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga u-no-yv-gv-i;  tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi-no Ga-lo-ne-dv u-na-li-s-ga-do-ta-nv-hi i-gv-yi do-dv-na-le-ni;

130417.english: Then we which are alive and remain shall be caught up together with them in the clouds, to meet the Lord in the air: and so shall we ever be with the Lord.
130417.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᎠᏴ ᏗᏛᏃᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏓᎴᏂᏙᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎡᎦᏘᎾᏫᏛᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎶᎩᎸᎢ, ᏫᏕᏓᏠᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏫᏕᎮᏍᏗ.
130417.phonetic: Hna-quo-no a-yv di-dv-no-dv a-le i-da-le-ni-do-hi na-s-gi i-tsu-la-ha e-ga-ti-na-wi-dv-di ge-se-s-di u-lo-gi-lv-i, wi-de-da-tlo-i-s-di-yi U-gv-wi-yu-hi ga-lv-lo-i; na-s-gi-no ni-go-hi-lv U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-tsu-la-ha wi-de-he-s-di.

130418.english: Wherefore comfort one another with these words.
130418.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏕᏣᏓᏪᏎᎲᎢ.
130418.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di de-tsa-da-ga-li-s-da-di-s-di-s-ge-s-di hi-a na-s-gi tsi-de-tsa-da-we-se-hv-i.

130501.english: But of the times and the seasons, brethren, ye have no need that I write unto you.
130501.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏕᎨᏌᏗᏒᎢ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᏚᎸᏗ ᏱᏂᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᏗᏱ.
130501.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-s-gi-ni ge-sv-i a-le na-hi-yu de-ge-sa-di-sv-i, i-da-li-nv-tli, v-tla u-du-lv-di yi-ni-tsa-li-s-da-ne-ha i-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-di-yi.

130502.english: For yourselves know perfectly that the day of the Lord so cometh as a thief in the night.
130502.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏒᏰᏃ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏥᎦᏔ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᎦ ᎤᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎦᏃᏍᎩᏍᎩ ᏒᏃᏱ ᏥᎦᎷᎪᎢ.
130502.phonetic: I-tsv-sv-ye-no o-si-yu i-tsi-ga-ta na-s-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li i-ga u-li-ye-i-lo-hi-s-di ge-sv na-s-gi-ya ga-no-s-gi-s-gi sv-no-yi tsi-ga-lu-go-i.

130503.english: For when they shall say, Peace and safety; then sudden destruction cometh upon them, as travail upon a woman with child; and they shall not escape.
130503.cherokee: ᎾᎯᏳᏰᏃ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏄᎾᏰᎯᏍᏛᎾ ᎠᎾᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᏄᏰᎶᎢᏍᏔᏅᏛ ᎠᏓᏛᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎷᏤᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᎩᎵᏯ ᏧᎷᏤᎰ ᎠᎨᏴ ᎦᏁᎵᏛ; ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎤᎾᏗᏫᏎᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
130503.phonetic: Na-hi-yu-ye-no nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv a-le nu-na-ye-hi-s-dv-na a-na-di-s-ge-s-di, hna-quo nu-ye-lo-i-s-ta-nv-dv a-da-dv-di-s-gi u-ni-lu-tse-di ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi-ya a-gi-li-ya tsu-lu-tse-ho a-ge-yv ga-ne-li-dv; a-le v-tla u-na-di-wi-se-di yi-ge-se-s-di.

130504.english: But ye, brethren, are not in darkness, that that day should overtake you as a thief.
130504.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᎵᏏᎬ ᏱᏤᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏣᏢᏔᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎦᏃᏍᎩᏍᎩ ᏧᏢᏔᏍᎪᎢ.
130504.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni, i-da-li-nv-tli, v-tla u-li-si-gv yi-tse-ha, na-s-gi na na-hi-yu i-ga ge-tsa-tlv-ta-s-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi na-s-gi-ya ga-no-s-gi-s-gi tsu-tlv-ta-s-go-i.

130505.english: Ye are all the children of light, and the children of the day: we are not of the night, nor of darkness.
130505.cherokee: ᏂᏥᎥᎢ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏘ ᏧᏪᏥ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎦ ᏧᏪᏥ; ᎥᏝ ᏒᏃᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏏᎬ ᎢᏕᎯ ᏱᎩ.
130505.phonetic: Ni-tsi-v-i i-ga--ga-ti tsu-we-tsi, a-le i-ga tsu-we-tsi; v-tla sv-no-yi a-le u-li-si-gv i-de-hi yi-gi.

130506.english: Therefore let us not sleep, as do others; but let us watch and be sober.
130506.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏗᎵᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ ᎾᎾᏛᏁᎲᎢ; ᎢᏗᏯᏫᏍᎨᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎴ ᏂᏗᎩᏴᏍᏕᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
130506.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tle-s-di yi-di-li-he-s-di, na-s-gi-ya a-ni-so-i na-na-dv-ne-hv-i; i-di-ya-wi-s-ge-s-di-s-gi-ni a-le ni-di-gi-yv-s-de-s-gv-na ge-se-s-di.

130507.english: For they that sleep sleep in the night; and they that be drunken are drunken in the night.
130507.cherokee: ᎠᏂᎵᎯᏰᏃ, ᏒᏃᏱ ᏓᏂᎵᎰᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᏂᏴᏍᏕᏍᎩ, ᏒᏃᏱ ᏚᏂᏴᏍᏕᏍᎪᎢ.
130507.phonetic: A-ni-li-hi-ye-no, sv-no-yi da-ni-li-ho-i; a-le na-s-gi na tsu-ni-yv-s-de-s-gi, sv-no-yi du-ni-yv-s-de-s-go-i.

130508.english: But let us, who are of the day, be sober, putting on the breastplate of faith and love; and for an helmet, the hope of salvation.
130508.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎦ ᎢᏕᎯ ᏥᎩ ᏂᏗᎩᏴᏍᏕᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᏓᏁᏣᏍᏚᎶ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏓᏓᏁᏥᏍᏚᎶᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎡᎩᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎢᎬᏒ ᎢᎦᎵᏍᏚᎶᏕᏍᏗ.
130508.phonetic: A-yv-s-gi-ni i-ga i-de-hi tsi-gi ni-di-gi-yv-s-de-s-gv-na ge-se-s-di, a-da-ne-tsa-s-du-lo go-hi-yu-di ge-sv a-le a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv i-da-da-ne-tsi-s-du-lo-di-s-ge-s-di, e-gi-s-de-lv-di-yi-no ge-sv u-du-gi i-gv-sv i-ga-li-s-du-lo-de-s-di.

130509.english: For God hath not appointed us to wrath, but to obtain salvation by our Lord Jesus Christ,
130509.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎦᏑᏰᏒ ᎤᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎩᎷᏤᏗᏱ; ᎠᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎩᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ;
130509.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no v-tla yi-ga-su-ye-sv u-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv i-gi-lu-tse-di-yi; a-li-s-de-lv-do-di-s-gi-ni i-gi-wa-dv-di-yi i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv;

130510.english: Who died for us, that, whether we wake or sleep, we should live together with him.
130510.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎩᏲᎱᎯᏎᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏱᏗᎵᎭ ᎠᎴ ᏂᏗᎵᎲᎾ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏫᎦᏕᏗᏱ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
130510.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsi-gi-yo-hu-hi-se-le-i, na-s-gi na-s-quo yi-di-li-ha a-le ni-di-li-hv-na yi-gi, na-s-gi i-tsu-la-ha wi-ga-de-di-yi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

130511.english: Wherefore comfort yourselves together, and edify one another, even as also ye do.
130511.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᏕᏣᏓᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏣᏓᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏂᏣᏛᏁᎭ.
130511.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, de-tsa-da-ga-li-s-da-di-s-ge-s-di, a-le de-tsa-da-li-ni-go-hi-s-di-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi-ya tsi-ni-tsa-dv-ne-ha.

130512.english: And we beseech you, brethren, to know them which labour among you, and are over you in the Lord, and admonish you;
130512.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏔᏲᏎᎭ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏥᎦᏔᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎨᏣᏁᎶᏗ ᏥᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏕᏣᏁᎶᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᎨᏣᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᎭ;
130512.phonetic: A-le i-tsv-ta-yo-se-ha, i-da-li-nv-tli, na-s-gi di-tsi-ga-ta-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi na-s-gi na tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi i-tse-hv-i, a-le di-ge-tsa-ne-lo-di tsi-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi de-tsa-ne-lo-dv-i, a-le tsi-ge-tsa-nv-da-di-s-di-ha;

130513.english: And to esteem them very highly in love for their work's sake. And be at peace among yourselves.
130513.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏗᏥᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎬᏗ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ.  ᎠᎴ ᏙᎯᏱ ᏂᏨᏁᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ.
130513.phonetic: A-le u-tsa-ti di-tsi-lv-quo-di-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi a-da-ge-yu-di gv-di nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i.  A-le do-hi-yi ni-tsv-ne-s-di i-tsv-sv i-tse-hv-i.

130514.english: Now we exhort you, brethren, warn them that are unruly, comfort the feebleminded, support the weak, be patient toward all men.
130514.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎢᏨᏔᏲᏎᎭ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᏕᏤᏯᏔᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏄᎾᏁᎸᎾ, ᏕᏥᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᏧᎾᏓᏅᏘ, ᏕᏥᏂᏴᏎᏍᏗ ᏗᏂᏩᎾᎦᎳᎢ, ᏗᏨᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏂᎥ [ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᏂᎨᏣᏛᏁᎲᎢ.]
130514.phonetic: A-le i-tsv-ta-yo-se-ha, i-da-li-nv-tli, de-tse-ya-ta-hv-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi na nu-na-ne-lv-na, de-tsi-ga-li-s-da-di-s-ge-s-di di-wa-na-ga-la tsu-na-da-nv-ti, de-tsi-ni-yv-se-s-di di-ni-wa-na-ga-la-i, di-tsv-ni-di-yu ge-se-s-di na-ni-v [u-tsa-ti-ni ni-ge-tsa-dv-ne-hv-i.]

130515.english: See that none render evil for evil unto any man; but ever follow that which is good, both among yourselves, and to all men.
130515.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏲ ᎾᎬᏁᎸ ᏳᏞᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏲ ᏱᎾᏓᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ; ᎢᏥᏍᏓᏩᏕᎨᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏨᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᏛᏗᏍᎬ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥᏉ.
130515.phonetic: Tle-s-di gi-lo u-yo na-gv-ne-lv yu-tle-ge-s-di u-yo yi-na-da-dv-ne-he-s-di; i-tsi-s-da-wa-de-ge-s-di-s-gi-ni ni-go-hi-lv na-s-gi o-s-dv ge-sv-i, na-s-quo i-tsv-sv go-hu-s-di de-tsa-da-dv-di-s-gv, a-le na-ni-v-quo.

130518.english: In every thing give thanks: for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus concerning you.
130518.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᏂᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᎵᏕᎬ ᎡᏣᎵᎡᎵᏤᎮᏍᏗ [ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ;] ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏖᎮᎲ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏕᏣᏁᎶᏛ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
130518.phonetic: Ni-ga-v-quo ni-tsa-li-s-da-ne-li-de-gv e-tsa-li-e-li-tse-he-s-di [U-ne-la-nv-hi;] hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi i-tsa-da-nv-te-he-hv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv de-tsa-ne-lo-dv i-yu-s-di.

130521.english: Prove all things; hold fast that which is good.
130521.cherokee: ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎪᎵᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ; ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᏕᏥᏂᏴᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ.
130521.phonetic: Nu-da-le-sv go-hu-s-di i-tsi-go-li-ye-s-ge-s-di; a-s-da-ya de-tsi-ni-yv-se-s-di na-s-gi na o-s-dv ge-sv-i.

130522.english: Abstain from all appearance of evil.

130523.english: And the very God of peace sanctify you wholly; and I pray God your whole spirit and soul and body be preserved blameless unto the coming of our Lord Jesus Christ.
130523.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᏂᎦᎷᎶᎬᎾ ᎢᏥᏅᎦᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᏂᎬ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏖᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏥᏰᎸᎢ ᏤᏥᏍᏆᏂᎪᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏂᏚᏚᎯᏍᏛᎾ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎦᎷᏨ ᎢᏳᎢ.
130523.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-no u-wa-sv nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv a-da-ne-hi ni-ga-lu-lo-gv-na i-tsi-nv-ga-lv-di ge-se-s-di; a-le ni-gv i-tsa-da-nv-te-di-yi a-le di-tsa-da-nv-do a-le di-tsi-ye-lv-i tse-tsi-s-qua-ni-go-da-ne-di ge-se-s-di, ni-du-du-hi-s-dv-na i-tsa-li-s-do-di-yi i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv ga-lu-tsv i-yu-i.

130524.english: Faithful is he that calleth you, who also will do it.
130524.cherokee: ᏄᏓᎵᏓᏍᏛᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᏣᏯᏅᏛ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎ ᏥᏅᏛᏛᏁᎵ.
130524.phonetic: Nu-da-li-da-s-dv-na na-s-gi na i-tsa-ya-nv-dv, na-s-quo na-s-gi a-se tsi-nv-dv-dv-ne-li.

130526.english: Greet all the brethren with an holy kiss.

130527.english: I charge you by the Lord that this epistle be read unto all the holy brethren.
130527.cherokee: ᎢᏨᏁᏤᎭ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏨᏁᎢᏍᏓᏁᎭ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎨᏥᎪᎵᏰᏗᏱ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ.
130527.phonetic: I-tsv-ne-tse-ha U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-tsv-ne-i-s-da-ne-ha, hi-a na-s-gi go-we-li ge-tsi-go-li-ye-di-yi na-ni-v u-na-da-nv-ti a-na-li-nv-tli.

130528.english: The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with you. Amen.
130528.cherokee: ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏕᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
130528.phonetic: I-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv de-tsi-ka-hna-wa-di-do-he-s-di.  E-me-nv.
